creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
@Reporter Could you submit the new ports as (two) separate issues and set their issue ID's against this issues "Blocks" field

If there's a URL for the intervening releases, please also add that to the URL field here

On the issue of maintainer, we can implicitly approve (with QA confirmed) after a two week timeout. If you'd like to propose and take MAINTAINER'ship, please update the patch accordingly

Thanks for your update!
